'''wagaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadership|leadership]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadership|leadership]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wagaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wægæzæth|wægæzæth]] || [[word:wægæzæj|wægæzæj]] || [[word:wægæzæsh|wægæzæsh]] || [[word:wægæzæ|wægæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wagagazath|wagagazath]] || [[word:wagagazaj|wagagazaj]] || [[word:wagagazash|wagagazash]] || [[word:wagagaza|wagagaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wagazath|wagazath]] || [[word:wagazaj|wagazaj]] || [[word:wagazash|wagazash]] || [[word:wagaza|wagaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wagafzath|wagafzath]] || [[word:wagafzaj|wagafzaj]] || [[word:wagafzash|wagafzash]] || [[word:wagafzaf|wagafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wagazatha|wagazatha]] || [[word:wagazaja|wagazaja]] || [[word:wagazasha|wagazasha]] || [[word:wagazaka|wagazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wagazath|wagazath]] || [[word:wagazaj|wagazaj]] || [[word:wagazash|wagazash]] || [[word:wagaza|wagaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wagazathal|wagazathal]] || [[word:wagazajal|wagazajal]] || [[word:wagazashal|wagazashal]] || [[word:wagazakal|wagazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wagazathatha|wagazathatha]] || [[word:wagazajaja|wagazajaja]] || [[word:wagazashasha|wagazashasha]] || [[word:wagazaka|wagazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wagazathan|wagazathan]] || [[word:wagazajan|wagazajan]] || [[word:wagazashan|wagazashan]] || [[word:wagazakan|wagazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wagazathaoro|wagazathaoro]] || [[word:wagazajaoro|wagazajaoro]] || [[word:wagazashaoro|wagazashaoro]] || [[word:wagazakaoro|wagazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
